title: Brazil Outlaws Crypto Remittances From FX Companies
message_html: Brazil Outlaws Crypto Remittances From FX Companies ...
snippet: Brazil has forbidden electronic foreign exchange (eFX) companies from using cryptocurrencies to settle overseas remittances. That’s according to a new resolution from the country’s central bank, published last week and flagged Sunday (May 3) in a report by CoinDesk. Under the new rules, set to go in
